general.byline: Frontend Engineer & Designer in Kaunas, Lithuania

projects.heading: Playlistai
projects.description: Designed and built a tool to create Spotify playlists guided by a single input. Powered by SpotifyAPI and ChatGPT.
projects.title: Playlistai

projects.heading: Xreader
projects.description: Designed and built a chrome extension that reads x.com and outputs a cleaner, more minimal version of it. Additionally, you can generate summary for up to several days of your timeline content.
projects.title: Xreader

projects.heading: Weather App & Widget concept
projects.description:
Designed a weather app concept centered on:

* next 12-hours weather forecast inspired by analog clock, aiming for quick and effortless understanding of the weather at specific times and a clear overview of the day ahead.

* 24-hours weather diagram offering more comprehensive insights for entire days, presenting all the most important weather variables (temperature, wind, precipitation, cloud cover) in a single view.
projects.title: Weather App & Widget concept

projects.heading: Hostinger AI Logo Maker
projects.description: Designed, built and experimented with completely AI based Logo Maker. The main goal was to give clients the simplest possible flow, and the most unique logos, unlocked by breakthrough language and image generation models.
projects.title: Hostinger AI Logo Maker

projects.heading: Klary
projects.description: My friend [Justinas](https://x.com/justinasgul) and I collaborated to create a platform designed for people—most often teammates—to share feedback with one another. You can [learn more](https://klary.co/#story) about the story behind its creation or [try the app](https://app.klary.co) (it's free, only google login required).
projects.title: Klary

workExperience.heading: Frontend Engineer at Hostinger
workExperience.description:
As a member of Website Builder core team, I contributed to key product functionalities including data manipulation, undo/redo, text editing, users site rendering & performance, global styling, website generator wizard. Over the last few years, I expanded my role to include designing features alongside frontend development.

Additionaly, I was owning, designing and building the Hostinger Logo Maker side-product which across several iterations had - authentication, AI logo generation, editing canvas and premium download and credit purchase flows.
workExperience.title: Frontend Engineer

education.heading: Medicine at Lithuanian University of Health Sciences
education.description: Studied medicine for 3 years, learned some fundamental knowledge about human body and the value of hard work. Truly enjoyed health sciences, but had to pause the studies due to personal health issues, during that time started exploring the world of digital products, found a great passion for it and decided to stay in this field.
